## What and why

<!-- What does this change, and what problem does it solve?
     Link any issue it closes, e.g. "Fixes #123". -->

## How it was tested

<!-- Every behavior change ships with a test that fails without it. -->

- [ ] `pytest` passes
- [ ] Added or updated a test for the change
- [ ] Updated the docs / README / CHANGELOG if the change is user-facing

## Notes for the reviewer

<!-- Anything crypto-sensitive? If you touched the signature base or parameter
